task: Reposition the top remote on the bottom one
raw:
Scene: top_remote, bottom_remote, orange_cushion, yellow_cushion, blue_cloth, couch
Step 1: reach(top_remote)
  affordance_region: the top remote on the orange cushion
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, top_remote, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, top_remote) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(top_remote)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the top remote
  contact: holding(top_remote) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(top_remote)
Step 3: transport(top_remote -> bottom_remote)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bottom remote
  spatial: above(top_remote, bottom_remote, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(top_remote)
  done_when: above(top_remote, bottom_remote, 0.05)
Step 4: place(top_remote -> bottom_remote)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bottom remote
  contact: surface_contact(top_remote, bottom_remote) [completion]; released(top_remote) [completion]
  pose: stable(top_remote) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(top_remote, bottom_remote) AND released(top_remote) AND stable(top_remote)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top remote on the orange cushion
the top surface of the top remote
an empty area on the bottom remote
an empty area on the bottom remote
steps.done_when: surface_contact(top_remote, bottom_remote) AND released(top_remote) AND stable(top_remote)
